projects.summary: Flagship pytest framework with API, web, and unit coverage
Playwright JS browser automation — 12 focused spec files, GitHub Actions CI
Selenium WebDriver automation — 5 focused test files covering the portfolio site, GitHub Actions CI
Pytest API tests — smoke and regression coverage against the deployed Render backend
Postman/Newman collection — full posts CRUD workflow with 19 assertions against the Render backend
k6 load testing — baseline, ramp-up, and soak scenarios against the deployed Render backend, nightly CI
